ing fraction is further multiplied by 60 and divided as before,
it will give you the Ghatis. In the present case Dhanistha lasted
on the previous day till 47 Ghatis and 45 Vighatis. And on
the day of birth Satabhisak lasted for 55-15 Ghatis. So its total
duration is 67-30 Ghatis. The time of birth in Ghatis is 8-45.
On the previous day already 12-15 Ghatis had been covered, and
on the day of birth 8-45. So the total of elapsed part of the
Naksatra is 12-15 plus 8-45 Ghatis. That is 21 Ghatis. From
the above table you know that the Daia-lord for Satabhisak

MOON'S STATES AND CONSTELLATIONS 57
is Rahu and its duration is 18 years. Now what is the part of
the star still remaining ? It is 46-30 Ghatis. So the balance of
R&hudaia at birth is 46-30/67-30 x 18 yrs. This is equal to
31/45x18 = 12 yrs. 4m. 24d, A better method of calculating
this would be from the longitude of the Moon. You know her
longitude to be lOMO'-Sl '-45*. This also gives the second
Pada of Satabhisak.
